llm_eval.notes: genuine code-review + 30思考法検証。生成 harness の skill/command/agent/hook/script surface 横断依存グラフを決定論抽出 (nodes/edges/gaps・id昇順正準化)。未知参照/循環/空graphを fail-closed (exit1)・JSON は失敗時も stdout。builtin agent allowlist で gap 誤検出回避。find_cycle は反復 DFS (§17c: 深鎖2000 surfaceでも RecursionError なし・path再構成付き)。TESTS: tests/scripts-plugins/test_harness_creator__extract_capability_dependency_graph.py 17ケース PASS (surface発見/edge5型/builtin除外/gap/dedup/cycle3型/deep-chain/diamond)。coverage 94%。
